title: narcissus tazetta subsp. ochroleucus
intro: Narcissus tazetta subsp. ochroleucus, commonly known as the Cream Narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow or cream-colored flowers with a strong, sweet fragrance. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta subsp. ochroleucus include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs can be dried and processed into teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
